about.availabilityText: Available for commissions, residencies, and collaborative projects
about.layersTitle: Work made of layers and time
about.para1: Pilar Olivero (Buenos Aires, 1988) is an artist and art therapist whose practice moves between textile installation, alternative photography, and durational performance. She lives and works in Paris.
about.para2: Trained at the Universidad Nacional de las Artes in Buenos Aires and the École Nationale Supérieure des Beaux-Arts in Paris, her work is grounded in the intersection of body, memory, and archive.
about.practiceTitle: Four ways of touching the world
